programmes.show_description: OJ's live through the night from the Salford Riviera. In aid of the new Harry Styles album, OJ is asking what do you like to do all the time, or just occasionally?

programmes.show_name: Alternative Sounds of the 90s with Dermot O'Leary
programmes.show_description: Dermot continues his rundown of 90s albums to reach No 1, including Nirvana, Alanis & Ash.
It's Early Breakfast with Owain Wyn Evans, featuring Step Back in Time and Airdrum Anthems! We will be waking you up with the latest in showbiz and singalong hits!
Scott's got your morning sorted... with fun, showbiz guests and music to get you up and out! Come and play the Birthday Game or take on the Easiest Quiz on the Radio.
Vernon explores the BBC archive in Vernon's Vault and two listeners take on the mid-morning music quiz Ten To The Top. Plus, Tim Burgess chooses two more Tracks Of My Years.
Jeremy and guests discuss the news headlines and talk to the people making them.
Trevor is bringing you some of the best music from across the decades to get you through the afternoon.
Sara gets you through teatime with plenty of giggles and some fab music. Plus Totally Teavoted, the SARA Awards, Alphabest and Hatched, Matched and Dispatched.
Sara plays the biggest and best tunes to get you up dancing!
Jo brings her Shiny Happy Playlist, 30 minutes of feel-good music from 7-7.30pm to soundtrack listeners' weekday evening.
Jo has the Thursday Theme: songs related to crafts and crafting to celebrate National Craft Month. Send your song suggestions to: jo.whiley@bbc.co.uk.

programmes.show_name: The Country Show with Bob Harris
programmes.show_description: 'Twas the night before C2C and the house is jammed! Ty Myers, Tyla Rodrigues and Zach Top will be playing live and The Shires will be popping in with a little surprise!

programmes.show_name: The Good Groove with DJ Spoony
programmes.show_description: Feel-good dancefloor favourites to make you groove, and DJ Spoony hits the decks for a live mix!
OJ is live through the night from the Salford Riviera with Midnight Mastermind, Wish You Were There, Midnight Caller and a huge Ravio 2 to end the week.

programmes.show_name: Dance Sounds of the 90s with Vernon Kay
programmes.show_description: Your name is on the guest list so join Vernon Kay for an hour of pure club floorfillers!
It's Early Breakfast with Owain Wyn Evans, featuring Step Back in Time and Airdrum Anthems. It's your official early morning weekend warm up! What can't you wait for?!
It's Big Guest Friday with Joel Dommett, Johannes Radebe and Alison Moyet in the studio! Plus, the Wonder Years is a Country Special.
The Charlatans' frontman and solo artist Tim Burgess joins Vernon for his final two song selections of the week in Tracks Of My Years. Plus, two listeners take on Ten To The Top.
Jeremy is joined by Kezia Gill as part of Radio 2's celebration of the Country to Country festival on Radio 2.
Trevor is bringing you some of the best music from across the decades to get you through the afternoon.
It's All Request Friday, and Sara wants to hear from you on 88291 or sara.cox@bbc.co.uk.
Get into the groove and dance yourself dizzy at Michelle's Fabulous Friday party.
Michelle's Mood is...DO YOU? Your 30 minutes of non-stop bops is about to POP!
Sophie's playing two hours of tunes to move to! There's more Request Line action and having just got back from touring Oz, she takes a trip down under in the Disco Wonderland.

programmes.show_name: The Rock Show with Shaun Keaveny
programmes.show_description: Shaun curates an hour of the best rock ever heard on Radio 2.
